title: Harissa Meatballs & Herby Quinoa
summary: Spicy meatballs, burst tomatoes and herby quinoa. Finished with a dollop of yoghurt to cool things down,  this one’s a proper weeknight winner that you can make in no time.

method.description: Place a frying pan over a medium heat with a drizzle of olive oil. Once hot, add the meatballs and sear all over for 5-6 mins until browned.
Tip in the cherry tomatoes and cook for 4-5 mins, stirring occasionally, until the meatballs are cooked through and the tomatoes are starting to burst.
Stir the harissa and water together to make a sauce, then add it to the pan. Let it bubble for a minute. Add a splash more water if you want a looser sauce.
Meanwhile, finely chop the coriander and reheat the quinoa. Toss the two together and season with a pinch of salt.
Share the quinoa between plates. Top with the meatballs, tomatoes and harissa sauce. Add a dollop of yoghurt on the side.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
